---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to scoring, validation, or usability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What decision would this help a creator or researcher make?

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the signal, workflow, report, or integration you want.

## Data And Quota Impact

Does this require YouTube API calls, Trends calls, LLM calls, paid data, or a new fixture?

## Validation Idea

How could we tell whether this improves recommendations rather than only adding complexity?
